REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER RELEASING MECHANICS LIEN PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTIONS 8480 ET SEQ. IS GRANTED, IN PART. PETITIONER WILL NOT BE AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AND FILING FEES INCURRED FROM RE-NOTICING THE HEARING IN DEPT. 501, WHICH OCCURRED SOLELY DUE TO COUNSEL'S FAILURE TO FOLLOW LOCAL RULES. NOR SHOULD PETITIONER BE AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR TIME SPENT ON A REPLY TO AN OPPOSITION THAT WAS NOT FILED. THUS, PETITIONER IS AWARDED $4,907.50 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $556.65 IN COSTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Greg Wood, Esq., of Wood Litigation Tel:415.247.7900 for Respondent REFRIGERATION UNLIMITED, LLC
No other appearances made in this matter.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

RESPONDENT REFRIGERATION UNLIMITED, LLC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is granted.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: In-Person Appearance

Celin Nguyen, wood litigation, APC, 415-247-7900, for respondant
No other appearances

Ms. Nguyen contests to the tentative. No notice was given to opposing counsel. Court striken late opposition. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY Amended Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq. is GRANTED, in part. Petitioner will not be awarded attorney's fees and filing fees incurred from re-noticing the hearing in Dept. 501, which occurred solely due to counsel's failure to follow local rules. Nor should Petitioner be awarded attorney's fees for time spent on a Reply to an Opposition that was not filed. Thus, Petitioner is awarded $4,907.50 in attorney's fees and $556.65 in costs.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC.'s Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.

Off calendar for department 302. The petition may be re-noticed to be heard in department 501, the Real Property Court. That court handles all law and motion matters in real property cases per Local Rule 8.10.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
